title: Havells India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Havells India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Havells India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Havells India:
Havells India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Havells India!
